channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: So far, Florida has failed to end vaccine mandates. Now there's a last-ditch effort
item.description: Florida Republicans have pushed hard to drop some vaccine requirements for children. But after many months, their efforts stalled out. Could this week...

item.title: The MAHA movement is mad about glyphosate and Trump's EPA
item.description: Some people in the MAHA movement are angry with the Trump administration's stance on environmental toxins â including its current support for the make...

item.title: What could Florida's vaccine mandate struggles teach other states?
item.description: Republicans in Florida pushed hard to drop some childhood vaccine requirements for school. But efforts petered out. What could this mean for other sta...

item.title: Why Your Throat Hurts When You Wake Up
